Part.Source:
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */

Event Start /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &MDFeSts1 = nullvalue(&MDFeSts1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFESTS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &MDFeSts2 = nullvalue(&MDFeSts2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFESTS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &MDFeSts3 = nullvalue(&MDFeSts3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFESTS' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Manifesto Eletrônico Documentos Fiscais' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh If &MDFeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty() &MDFeDtaEms_To = serverdate() &MDFeDtaEms = &MDFeDtaEms_To - 7 EndIF retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWMDFE', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount MDFeSts.ColumnHeaderClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &AuxUpdate = !'' &EventsMDfe.Clear() &EventsMDfe.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') If (MDFeSts = Status_MDfe.Digitando) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(1, 'Reenviar') Endif &EventsMDfe.AddItem(2, 'Consultar') If (MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Autorizado) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(3, 'Encerrar') Endif &EventsMDfe.AddItem(4, 'Clonar') If (MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Autorizado) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(5, 'Cancelar') Endif If (MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Autorizado or MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Encerrado) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(6, 'Baixar Xml') Endif If (MDFeSts = Status_MDfe.Autorizado) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(7, 'Incluir Condutor') Endif If (MDFeSts = Status_MDfe.Autorizado and MdfeIndCarregaPosterior = Status_SimNao.Sim) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(8, 'Incluir DF-e') Endif &EventsMDfe.AddItem(9, 'Averbar na Atm') &EventsMDfe.AddItem(10, 'Log Erros') If (MDFeSts = Status_MDfe.Digitando) &EventsMDfe.AddItem(11, 'Excluir') Endif &EnviarEmail = !'' If (MDFeSts <> Status_NFe.Digitando) &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Attribute' Else &EnviarEmail.Class = !'Invisible' Endif &IMprimir = !'' Do Case Case MDFeAveSts = Status_Nfe.Digitando &GridBadge = format(!"", "Não Declarado") Case MDFeAveSts = Status_Nfe.Autorizada &GridBadge = format(!"", "Declarado") Case MDFeAveSts = Status_Nfe.Cancelada &GridBadge = format(!"", "Cancelada") Otherwise &GridBadge = '' EndCase Do Case Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Digitando MDFeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagInfo WWColumnTagInfoSingleCell' Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Cancelado MDFeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagWarning WWColumnTagWarningSingleCell' Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Autorizado MDFeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagSuccess WWColumnTagSuccessSingleCell' Case MDFeSts = Status_MDFe.Encerrado MDFeSts.ColumnClass = !'WWColumn hidden-xs WWColumnTag WWColumnTagDanger WWColumnTagDangerSingleCell' Otherwise MDFeSts.ColumnClass = 'WWColumn hidden-xs' EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ If not FilAtmUsu.Trim().IsEmpty() &GridBadge.Visible = True Else &GridBadge.Visible = False EndIf EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EventsMDfe.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &EventsMDfe = 1 Do 'Do Reinviar' Case &EventsMDfe = 2 Do 'Do Consultar' Case &EventsMDfe = 3 Do 'Do Encerrar' Case &EventsMDfe = 4 Do 'Do Clonarmdfe' Case &EventsMDfe = 5 Do 'Do Cancelar' Case &EventsMDfe = 6 Do 'Do ExportXml' Case &EventsMDfe = 7 Do 'Do InclusaoCondutor' Case &EventsMDfe = 8 Do 'Do InclusaoDFe' Case &EventsMDfe = 9 Do 'Do AverbaMdfe' Case &EventsMDfe = 10 Do 'Do Solicitacao' Case &EventsMDfe = 11 Do 'Do Excluir' EndCase &EventsMDfe = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &EnviarEmail.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpEnviaMdfe.PopUp(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoInsert' If 1=2 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ MDFe.Call(TrnMode.Insert, nullvalue(EmpCod), nullvalue(FilCod), nullvalue(MDFeCod)) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else &WebSession.Remove('WPMDFE01_Data') wpMDFe01.Call(&PreviousStep, &CurrentStep, &GoingBack) EndIf EndEvent Event 'DoEncerramentoAvulso' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpEncerramentoMDFeAvulso.Call(&Context.EmpCod, &Context.FilCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'DoExportReport' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Generate PDF file. Do 'LoadGridState' InNewWindow1.Target = ExportReportWWMDFe.Link() InNewWindow1.Height = !'600' InNewWindow1.Width = !'800' InNewWindow1.OpenWindow() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MDFeSts1.Visible = False &MDFeOriUfeCod1.Visible = False &MDFeDstUfeCod1.Visible = False &MDFeCod1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFESTS' &MDFeSts1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' &MDFeOriUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' &MDFeDstUfeCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFECOD' &MDFeCod1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MDFeSts2.Visible = False &MDFeOriUfeCod2.Visible = False &MDFeDstUfeCod2.Visible = False &MDFeCod2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFESTS' &MDFeSts2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' &MDFeOriUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' &MDFeDstUfeCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFECOD' &MDFeCod2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &MDFeSts3.Visible = False &MDFeOriUfeCod3.Visible = False &MDFeDstUfeCod3.Visible = False &MDFeCod3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFESTS' &MDFeSts3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' &MDFeOriUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' &MDFeDstUfeCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFECOD' &MDFeCod3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFESTS' &MDFeSts2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFESTS' &MDFeSts3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Reinviar' GeraXmlMdfe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) WpAutorizaMDFe.Link('WWMDFE', EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Consultar' GravaConsultaSefazMDFE.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, &Context.PesCod, &SolCod) wpConsultaSefazMdfe.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, &SolCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Encerrar' If MDFeSts <> Status_MDFe.Autorizado msg('ATENÇÃO, Somente MDFe Autorizados podem ser Encerrados!') Else wpEncerramentoMDFe.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Clonarmdfe' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ WPClonarMDFe.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, MDFeNum) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelar' If MDFeSts <> Status_MDFe.Autorizado msg('ATENÇÃO, Somente MDFe Autorizados podem ser Cancelados!') Else wpCancelarMDfe.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ExportXml' &MdfeArqXml = RetornaXmlMdfe.udp(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) If not &MdfeArqXml.IsEmpty() retornaConfiguracoesPastas.Call(&EmpCod, &FilCod, &sdtConfiguracoesPasta) &Nome_arquivo = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempFis+MDFeChv+'.xml' &XmlWriter.Open(&Nome_arquivo) &XmlWriter.WriteRawText(&MdfeArqXml) &XmlWriter.Close() &Link = &sdtConfiguracoesPasta.PastaDiretorioTempVir+MDFeChv+'.xml' Link(&Link) Else Msg('ATENÇÃO! XML do MDFe não encontrado, Verifique!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InclusaoCondutor' If MDFeSts <> Status_MDFe.Autorizado msg('ATENÇÃO, Somente em MDFe Autorizados podem ser incluidos novos condutores!') Else WPIncluiCondutor.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do InclusaoDFe' If MDFeSts <> Status_MDFe.Autorizado msg('ATENÇÃO, Somente em MDFe Autorizados podem ser incluidos documentos fiscais!') Else WWIncluirDfe.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AverbaMdfe' &EmpCod = EmpCod &FilCod = FilCod Do 'ValidaUsuario' If &IsValido = True and not MDFeArqXml.IsEmpty() TransmiteAverbacaoMdfe.call(EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod,&SdtAtm,&IsSucesso, &erroMensagem) If &IsSucesso = true Grid.Refresh() Else msg(&erroMensagem) EndIf Else Msg('Não foi Possível transmitir a averbação, pois usuário e senha inválido ou documento não autorizado!') EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Solicitacao' wpSolicitacoesNF.Popup('MDFE', EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Excluir' DeletarMdfe.Call(EmpCod,FilCod,MDFeCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MDFENUM" &MDFeNum.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MDFEVEIPLATRA" &MdfeVeiPlaTra.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"MDFEDTAEMS" &MDFeDtaEms.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) &MDFeDtaEms_To.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.ValueTo) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFESTS' &MDFeSts1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' &MDFeOriUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' &MDFeDstUfeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFECOD' &MDFeCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MDFENUM", "", not &MDFeNum.IsEmpty(), 0, &MDFeNum.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MDFEVEIPLATRA", "", not &MdfeVeiPlaTra.IsEmpty(), 0, &MdfeVeiPlaTra, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"MDFEDTAEMS", "", not (&MDFeDtaEms.IsEmpty() AND &MDFeDtaEms_To.IsEmpty()), 0, &MDFeDtaEms.ToString().Trim(), &MDFeDtaEms_To.ToString().Trim()) Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFESTS' AND not &MDFeSts1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeSts1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' AND not &MDFeOriUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeOriUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' AND not &MDFeDstUfeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeDstUfeCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'MDFECOD' AND not &MDFeCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeCod1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFESTS' AND not &MDFeSts2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeSts2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' AND not &MDFeOriUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeOriUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' AND not &MDFeDstUfeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeDstUfeCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'MDFECOD' AND not &MDFeCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeCod2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFESTS' AND not &MDFeSts3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeSts3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFEORIUFECOD' AND not &MDFeOriUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeOriUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFEDSTUFECOD' AND not &MDFeDstUfeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeDstUfeCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'MDFECOD' AND not &MDFeCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &MDFeCod3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"MDFe" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &IMprimir.Click &MDfeArqXml = RetornaXmlMDFe.Udp(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod) If not &MDfeArqXml.IsEmpty() &RandomVarchar = retornaSoNumeros.Udp(serverTime()) &Documento = 'TICKET' + &RandomVarchar.Trim() RCOOpenWindow1.LinkOpen = RELJAS013_ToScreen.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, MDFeCod, &Documento) RCOOpenWindow1.OpenWindow(True, 500, 500, True, 0, 0, False) EndiF EndEvent Event &AuxUpdate.Click &WebSession.Remove('WPMDFE01_Data') &WizardData.Mdfe.EmpCod = EmpCod &WizardData.Mdfe.FilCod = FilCod &WizardData.Mdfe.MdfeCod = MDFeCod &WebSession.Set('WPMDFE01_Data', &WizardData.ToJson()) wpMDFe01.Call('', 'Mdfe', false) EndEvent Sub 'validaUsuario' &IsValido = False For each Order EmpCod,FilCod Where EmpCod = &EmpCod Where FilCod = &FilCod &SdtAtm.codigoatm = FilAtmCod &SdtAtm.senha = FilAtmSen &SdtAtm.usuario = FilAtmUsu &FilAtmCod = FilAtmCod &FilAtmUsu = FilAtmUsu &FilAtmSen = FilAtmSen exit EndFor If not &FilAtmCod.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilAtmUsu.Trim().IsEmpty() and not &FilAtmSen.Trim().IsEmpty() &IsValido = True EndIf EndSub

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
